Cross-Device Sync
🔄 Sync All Devices
Change on Android → updates on iPhone instantly. Uses Firebase (free, by Google). Takes 5 minutes to set up once.
Connected
Connected to room: Jassim2026
1
Create free Firebase project
a) Go to console.firebase.google.com
b) Click "Add project" → name it anything → Continue
c) Disable Google Analytics → Create project
d) In left menu: Build → Realtime Database
e) Click "Create database" → choose any region → "Start in test mode" → Enable
✓ Your database URL looks like:
https://YOUR-PROJECT-default-rtdb.firebaseio.com
2
Enter your database URL
Firebase Database URL
Copy from Firebase Console → Realtime Database page
3
Set a Sync Room Code
Use the same code on ALL your devices — Android, iPhone, tablet. Any word or number you choose.
Room Code (e.g. jassim2025)
HOW SYNC WORKS
• All devices with the same Room Code share one database
• Changes sync within 1-2 seconds — no refresh needed
• Works on Android, iPhone, iPad, Windows — any browser
• Works offline too — syncs when back online
• Firebase free tier is permanent and free for personal use
📎 Attachments
No attachments
Photo
Share This App
📤 Send to a Friend
Send a link, or publish to the web so anyone can install it on their phone.
One-Time Setup
🐙 Connect GitHub Pages
GitHub Pages gives your app a real HTTPS link (yourname.github.io/house-budget) — free forever, no branding. Takes 3 minutes to set up once.
1
Create a free GitHub account
Go to github.com → Sign up free (email or Google)
2
Get your Personal Access Token
a) Go to github.com/settings/tokens
b) Click "Generate new token (classic)"
c) Name it anything (e.g. house-budget)
d) Check ✓ public_repo under "repo"
e) Click Generate → copy the token (starts with ghp_)
3
Paste your token below
GitHub Personal Access Token
Saved locally — only sent to GitHub's API to publish your app.
🌐
Publishing to GitHub Pages…
Creating repo & uploading your app. Takes ~20 seconds.
Live on GitHub Pages 🎉
📱 Scan to Install
⏱ Page goes live in ~1 min after first publish.
1. Open link in Chrome
2. Tap ⋮ menu (top-right)
3. Tap "Add to Home Screen" → Install 🎉
1. Open link in Safari
2. Tap Share ⬆ (bottom bar)
3. "Add to Home Screen" → Add 🎉

Deploy Failed
Check your token and internet connection, then try again.
